gui.custom_mobs.creator.title: Custom Mobs Creator
gui.custom_mobs.projectile_creator.title: Custom Projectiles Creator
gui.custom_mobs.spawner_edit.title: Edit RPG Mob Spawner
gui.custom_mobs.bestiary.title: Bestiary - Discoveries Log
gui.custom_mobs.mcmodel.step1.tooltip1: The .bbmodel is usually located somewhere in the archive.
gui.custom_mobs.mcmodel.step1.tooltip3: We need to extract this model and open it inside Blockbench.
gui.custom_mobs.mcmodel.step2.tooltip1: Ensure the GeckoLib plugin is installed in Blockbench.
gui.custom_mobs.mcmodel.step2.tooltip3: Select Format: 'GeckoLib Animated Model' and click Convert.
gui.custom_mobs.mcmodel.step3.tooltip1: Go to File -> Export -> Export GeckoLib Model.
gui.custom_mobs.mcmodel.step4.tooltip1: Go to File -> Export -> Export GeckoLib Animations.
gui.custom_mobs.mcmodel.step5.tooltip1: Put the exported files & texture in a separate folder.
gui.custom_mobs.mcmodel.step5.tooltip2: Rename the folder to match the model ID (no spaces!).
gui.custom_mobs.mcmodel.step6.tooltip1: Switch the Model Type in this GUI to GECKOLIB.
gui.custom_mobs.mcmodel.step6.tooltip2: Set Model Path to your folder name.
gui.custom_mobs.mcmodel.step6.tooltip3: Configure animations and enjoy your custom mob!
gui.custom_mobs.spawner_edit.tooltip.rat: The frequency of spawn attempts in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second).
gui.custom_mobs.spawner_edit.tooltip.rad: The radius in blocks around the spawner within which mobs will spawn.
gui.custom_mobs.spawner_edit.tooltip.max: The maximum number of mobs spawned by this block allowed alive at the same time.
gui.custom_mobs.spawner_edit.tooltip.pla: The distance in blocks a player must be within for the spawner to tick.
gui.custom_mobs.spawner_edit.tooltip.eli: The percentage chance (0 to 100) that a spawned mob is an Elite version.
gui.custom_mobs.spawner_edit.tooltip.coo: Cooldown in seconds. Enforces a delay before attempting to spawn again.
gui.custom_mobs.spawner_edit.tooltip.day: Restrict spawning to day only, night only, or both.
gui.custom_mobs.spawner_edit.tooltip.red: If enabled, the spawner only attempts a spawn when receiving a redstone pulse.
gui.custom_mobs.bestiary.undiscovered: Undiscovered Entity. Slay this creature to unlock its logs.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.ranged: Shoots custom projectiles from a distance.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.target_revenge: Targets entities that attack it first.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.leap_attack: Leaps at targets from a distance.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.stalk: Stalks players from shadows before attacking.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.search: Searches last known location of players.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.avoid_player_w: Flees from players wearing specific items.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.avoid_mob: Flees from specified mob registry IDs.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.attack_others: Attacks all other mobs except its group.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.target_group: Targets and attacks designated mob groups.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.use_ability: Uses mapped RPG Mounts abilities in combat.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.explode_on_dea: Triggers explosion when the mob dies.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.teleport_on_hi: Has a chance to teleport when hurt.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.panic_on_fire: Runs around frantically when on fire.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.look_at_player: Tracks the nearest player with its head.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.explode_on_con: Charges and explodes like a Creeper.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.avoid_rain: Runs to seek cover from rain.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.seek_water: Seeks out and moves to nearby water.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.seek_fire: Moves towards fire or lava blocks.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.damaged_in_wat: Takes damage when in water or rain.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.heal_in_water: Regenerates health in water or rain.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.flee_rain: Seeks shelter when it starts raining.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.heal_in_fire: Regenerates health in fire or lava.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.seek_items: Finds and picks up ground items.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.speed_in_fire: Moves faster when in fire or lava.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.effect_on_atta: Applies effect to target when attacking.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.teleport_on_lo: Teleports away when health is below 20%.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_minions: Periodically summons mini servants to help in combat.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.teleport_behin: Periodically teleports directly behind its combat target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.pull_target: Repeatedly pulls target towards it with vertical Y lift.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.rage_mode: Gains damage and speed boosts when health drops below threshold.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.ambush: Becomes invisible and stalks targets before launching attacks.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.fire_trail: Leaves temporary fire blocks behind while moving in combat.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.frost_touch: Attacks freeze and slow down targets.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.disarm_strike: Attacks have a chance to disarm the player's weapon.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.lightning_stri: Chance to strike target with lightning on hit.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.gift_giver: Periodically gifts a random drop pool item to players.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.call_help: Rallies all nearby allies in the same group to target attacker.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.steal_item: Chance to steal an item from player inventory on attack.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.burrow: Burrows into the ground and teleports away when hurt.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.imitate_sounds: Periodically plays sounds of nearby mobs to confuse players.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.raid_id: Unique identifier for the raid configuration.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.radius: The distance in blocks from the spawner where players can participate and mobs spawn.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.wave_cooldown: Waiting time in seconds between raid waves.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.raid_cooldown: Cooldown duration in seconds after a raid completes before it can be triggered again.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.waves_count: Total number of waves in this raid.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.description: Lore and backstory shown in the Bestiary under Raids.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.add_item: Select an item from inventory or registry to add as loot reward.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.add_command: Add a command string to be executed upon raid completion.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.remove_reward: Remove the currently selected reward from the list.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.chance: Drop probability (0.0 to 1.0 where 1.0 is 100% guaranteed drop).
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.per_player: Toggle whether the reward drops/runs once per participant, or once globally.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.mob_count: Number of copies of this mob to spawn in the selected wave.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.elite_chance: Percentage chance (0-100) for spawned wave mobs to become Elites.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.waves_list: List of waves in the raid. Change the count in the Raid Info tab to add/remove.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.wave_mobs_list: Mobs configured to spawn in the selected wave.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.add_mob_list: Available custom mobs and vanilla entities. Click one to add it to the selected wave.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.remove_mob: Remove the selected mob from this wave.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.command_input: Configure the reward command execution string. Supports <player> placeholder.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.item_reward_edit: Configure the item reward ID and quantity (e.g. minecraft:diamond 5).
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.save: Saves all changes to this raid block and updates global config files.
chat.custom_mobs.raid.victory: §c[Raid] §aRaid Victory! Spawning loot at the spawner!
chat.custom_mobs.raid.defeated_location: §c[Raid] §aRaid Defeated! Spawning loot at the raid location!
chat.custom_mobs.raid.already_in_progres: §c[Raid] A raid is already in progress here!
chat.custom_mobs.raid.on_cooldown: §c[Raid] The raid is on cooldown! Cooldown remaining: %ss.
chat.custom_mobs.raid.no_waves: §c[Raid] This raid block has no waves configured!
chat.custom_mobs.raid.failed_no_players: §c[Raid] Raid failed! No players remain in the area.
command.custom_mobs.reloaded: Custom Mobs configuration, limits, and raids reloaded successfully.
command.custom_mobs.start_global: Started global raid '%s' at player position
command.custom_mobs.bestiary.add: Successfully registered slain mob '%s' to %s's bestiary.
command.custom_mobs.bestiary.remove: Successfully removed slain mob '%s' from %s's bestiary.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.name: Display name of the custom mob.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.mob_grou: Faction/group name to identify ally entities.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.taming_c: Percentage chance to tame this entity (0 to 100).
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.model_id: Vanilla entity registry path or MCModel ID.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.texture_: Path to the texture file asset.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.anim_pat: Path to the GeckoLib animations resource file.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.health: Maximum health points of this entity.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.follow_r: Range in blocks within which targets are tracked.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.attack_r: Custom melee strike range in blocks.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.kb_infli: Knockback velocity applied to targets on hit.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.step_hei: Maximum height block this entity can step up.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.reflecti: Percentage chance to reflect incoming projectiles (0 to 100).
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.ambient_: Sound event played at random intervals.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.step_sou: Sound event played on footstep cycles.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.hurt_sou: Sound event played when entity takes damage.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.death_so: Sound event played when entity dies.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.attack_s: Sound event played on attacking targets.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.spawn_bl: Required block registry ID below spawn points.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.biome_search: Search for biomes to add to spawn rules list.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.goal_animation: Animation trigger path override when goal is active.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.idle_anim: GeckoLib/Java animation name for idle state.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.walk_anim: GeckoLib/Java animation name for walking state.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.biome_remove: Click to remove this biome filter.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.raid_spa: If enabled, this mob will only spawn during raids or from spawners (not naturally in the world).
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.surface_: If enabled, this mob will only spawn in positions that can see the sky (not in caves/underground).
gui.custom_mobs.raid_editor.title: Raid Configurator
gui.custom_mobs.raid_editor.label.info1: Raid settings configuration page. Place in a world,
gui.custom_mobs.raid_editor.label.info2: right click in survival to start the configured challenge.
gui.custom_mobs.raid_editor.label.info3: Creative mode players can customize the settings.
gui.custom_mobs.raid_editor.label.comman: Command to be ran on reward:
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectile directly at target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.aerial_ranged_: Rains projectiles from above the target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.melee_aoe: Sweeps in a frontal cone hitting multiple targets.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.melee_aoe_2: Sweeps in a frontal cone hitting multiple targets (cooldowns apply).
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.melee_aoe_3: Sweeps in a frontal cone hitting multiple targets.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.melee_aoe_4: Sweeps in a frontal cone hitting multiple targets.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles at all entities inside a radius.
Summons ground projectiles at all entities inside a radius (cooldowns apply).
Summons ground projectiles at all entities inside a radius.
Summons ground projectiles at all entities inside a radius.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.aerial_ranged_: Rains projectiles across a circular zone centered on target.
Rains projectiles across a circular zone centered on target (cooldowns apply).
Rains projectiles across a circular zone centered on target.
Rains projectiles across a circular zone centered on target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.shotgun_attack: Fires multiple projectiles in a spread fan.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.knockback_atta: Deals melee strikes with massive knockback distance.
Deals second melee strikes with massive knockback distance.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.del: The duration of the delay in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second).
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.reward_qty: The quantity/count of this reward item.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.caves_on: If enabled, this mob will only spawn in positions that CANNOT see the sky (underground/caves).
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.aquatic: If enabled, this mob will only spawn inside water blocks.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.lava: If enabled, this mob will only spawn inside lava blocks.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.upw: The amount of vertical knockback velocity applied to the target on impact.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.pro: Determines the velocity of the projectile as it falls from the air.
The number of projectiles spawned per attack wave.
The horizontal dispersion radius of spawned projectiles.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.mel: The delay in ticks from the start of the attack animation until damage is applied to the target.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.upw: Configurable speed velocity of the summoned projectile as it rises.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.max: The height in blocks the projectile travels upwards before it starts falling.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.acc: Accuracy of the projectile from 1% to 100%. Higher values make projectile attacks more accurate.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.rad: The detection or impact radius of the attack in blocks.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.rea: The maximum sweep reach of the attack in blocks.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.wid: The sweep cone width of the melee attack in degrees.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.spe: The rotation speed of the orbiting shield or projectiles.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.dur: The active lifetime duration of the shield in ticks.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.idl: Duration in ticks for the mob to stand still and play its animation.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.kno: The knockback distance in blocks (maximum 32 blocks).
gui.custom_mobs.creator.projectile.toolt: Display name of the custom projectile.
Minecraft entity type registry ID or model identifier.
Resource path to model texture file.
Sound event trigger when projectile hits block/entity.
Particle type spawned along the projectile path (e.g. minecraft:small_flame).
Status effect ID applied on target hit.
Radius size of explosion on landing impact.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.orb: The distance of the orbiting shield from the center of the mob.
gui.custom_mobs.creator.tooltip.loop_com: If enabled, the combat combo sequence loops back to the beginning when finished. If disabled, it runs only once per target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles in a line towards the target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles in a line towards the target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles in multiple diverging lines.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles in multiple diverging lines.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles sequentially in a line.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles sequentially in a line.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles sequentially in multiple lines.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles sequentially in multiple lines.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles in a spiral pattern.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles in a spiral pattern.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles in multiple spiral lines.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles in multiple spiral lines.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles sequentially in a spiral pattern.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles sequentially in a spiral pattern.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles sequentially in multiple spirals.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles sequentially in multiple spirals.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_dome: Summons a defensive dome ring of projectiles around itself.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles in a cross (+) around target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles in a cross (+) around target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles sequentially expanding in a cross (+).
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles sequentially expanding in a cross (+).
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles in an X pattern around target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles in an X pattern around target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles sequentially expanding in an X pattern.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles sequentially expanding in an X pattern.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles expanding in a concentric shockwave ring.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles expanding in a concentric shockwave ring.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles sequentially in expanding concentric rings.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles sequentially in expanding concentric rings.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles closing in on target's feet.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles closing in on target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_ground_: Summons ground projectiles sequentially closing in on target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_aerial_: Summons aerial projectiles sequentially closing in on target.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_tether_: Siphons health, slows players, and heals boss via a tether link.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_chase_s: Spawns homing trail of projectile explosions chasing target's feet.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_gale_vo: Summons vortex pull hazard that sucks entities in and damages them.
Summons vortex push hazard that repels entities and damages them.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.summon_minion_: Summons a minion portal entity at a nearby location.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.spawn_minions: Minion portal AI logic that spawns mini servants up to a maximum count.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.stagger: Vulnerability state triggered at HP threshold, freezing actions and multiplying taken damage.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.idle: Makes the mob stand still for a set duration and play an animation.
gui.custom_mobs.goal_desc.scare_group: Scares away custom mobs belonging to a configured group.
gui.custom_mobs.tooltip.creator.spawn_en: Spawn location constraint: ANY (can spawn anywhere), SURFACE (only spawns under sky), or CAVES (only spawns underground).
gui.custom_mobs.creator.goal.tooltip.mel: The custom damage dealt by this melee attack. If left blank, defaults to the mob's base attack damage attribute.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.fireproof_scale: Immune to fire and lava damage.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.traction_tread: Moves faster on slippery ice blocks.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.rejuvenation_au: Slowly heals nearby allies in combat.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.deep_diver: Increases swim and navigation speed underwater.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.step_assist: Allows stepping up full blocks without jumping.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.shadow_camoufla: Blends into dark light levels to reduce visibility.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.thorn_guard: Reflects a percentage of incoming melee damage.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.photosynthesis: Heals health slowly when exposed to direct sunlight.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.toxic_secretion: Poisons attackers on physical melee contact.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.glacial_aura: Creates a frost aura that slows down nearby targets.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.magnetosphere: Pulls nearby dropped items towards itself.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.night_eyes: Gains perfect sight inside dark caves.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.reinforced_hide: Reduces all incoming physical damage by 15%.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.flame_breath: Shoots a cone of fire breath dealing fire damage.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.venomous_bite: Bites targets and inflicts poison effect.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.sonic_screech: Deals area shockwave damage on screech.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.thunder_stomp: Stomps ground to summon lightning spark triggers.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.frost_nova: Emits a freezing wave immobilizing nearby targets.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.healing_touch: Heals targeted companion mob for 10 HP.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.wind_glide: Glides down slowly from high areas.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.iron_wall: Reduces incoming damage by 80% for 3 seconds.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.infernal_charge: Burns and charges through target paths.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.life_steal_bite: Steals health from target on bite.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.trample: Crushes crops and steps on targets.
ability_desc.custom_mobs.feather_hover: Allows hovering in air for a short duration.
